contact.title: Any questions?
contact.subtitle: Contact us
contact.description: Feel free to contact us for any questions or information requests. Whether you want to learn more about our services, get help, or share your suggestions, our team is here to respond quickly. We look forward to supporting you!

form.nameMinLength: Company name must be more than 3 characters
form.nameMaxLength: Company name must be less than 100 characters
form.messageMinLength: Message must be more than 10 characters
form.messageMaxLength: Message must be less than 500 characters
form.emailSent: Email sent. We will do our best to respond as quickly as possible.

homepage.heroTitle: Master your cloud infrastructure's CO2 emissions
homepage.description: IroCO2 supports you in implementing your End-to-End GreenOps approach. Measure and estimate the carbon footprint of your Cloud infrastructures. Keep an eye on your infrastructures to understand your emissions. Benefit from advice to define a strategy to control emission trends.
homepage.measureDescription: Your emissions, start from facts to improve
homepage.understandDescription: The nature of your emissions and action levers
homepage.actDescription: By defining and applying a GreenOps strategy

infrastructure.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the infrastructure.
